description: Statuspage is Atlassian’s hosted status page service for publishing incident, maintenance, component, and uptime information to customers or internal audiences. Organizations use it to communicate service health and incident updates through branded public or private status pages.
summary: Statuspage.io exposes a documented REST API at https://api.statuspage.io/v1/ authenticated with a Statuspage API token passed either in the `Authorization` header or `api_key` query parameter; no public GraphQL, MCP server, or official CLI were found.
